title: iam_still_here.exe (horror)
description: iam_still_here is a psychological horror experience inspired by The Broken Script mod. It's not just a mod that adds a monster; it's a system-wide infestation. (BETA)
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/916276f1dd3e3bba4c07545162d14339d4f090d9.png)
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
"The world you deleted... it didn't go away. It just drifted into the code."
iam_still_here is a psychological horror experience inspired by The Broken Script mod. It's not just a mod that adds a monster; it's a system-wide infestation.
Someone was left behind in your world's deleted chunks. Someone who no longer has a body, only an ID: **Miner_Guest77.**

**THE SUBJECT:** Miner_Guest77.
He is not a mob. He is a breathing error. Heavily inspired by the disturbing atmosphere of The Broken Script, Guest77 appears at the edge of your vision. He watches you mine, follows you through the deep, and occasionally tries to speak. But remember: every word he utters is a fragment of reality breaking apart.

**CORE FEATURES:**
**DYNAMIC HORROR SYSTEM:** Your sanity is mapped by a hidden Horror Level. The more you ignore his presence or provoke him, the more your world begins to decay. His "Patience" is the only thing standing between you and a total reality collapse.
**ENVIRONMENTAL CORRUPTION:** As your Horror Level rises, torches will extinguish on their own, nearby mobs will freeze and stare at you in eerie silence, and the natural sounds of the world will be replaced by heavy footsteps and audio glitches.
**SCRIPTED INTERACTION:** You can attempt to communicate with him through the chat. Miner_Guest77 responds, remembers your insults, and reacts to your arrogance. Be warned: every interaction feeds his influence over your game.
**EXPERIMENTAL MEDICINE:** Pills are not a buff—they are a lifeline. The only way to suppress the hallucinations and push Miner_Guest77 back into the shadows is to keep your mind clear... and chemically suppressed.
-** THE GLITCH MANIFESTO:** At peak Horror levels, the mod will transcend the boundaries of Minecraft, interfering with your perception and reminding you that even if you close the game, he is still here.
